verdict_reasoning: KLK2 is a secreted trypsin-like serine protease produced by prostate epithelium with no TM/GPI anchor, yet recent IHC, multiplex-IF, confocal, and flow-cytometry data confirm a bona-fide cell-surface pool on prostate cancer cells alongside the dominant secreted pool. Surface KLK2 is being clinically targeted by a CD3 bispecific (pasritamig, Ph3), 225Ac radioligand (JNJ-69086420), and CAR-T programs, with documented antibody binding and internalization on intact cells. Dual surface + secreted localization restricted to prostate lineage.
